message:
fix(demo): Prevent underflow in easing animation track drawing

Add bounds checking to prevent arithmetic underflow when calculating
animation track positions in the demo showcase.

Changes:
- Add `track_w >= 2` guard before drawing easing animation tracks
- Use saturating_sub(1) for dot position calculation to handle edge
  cases where track width could be very small

This fixes potential panics or visual glitches when the terminal window
is resized to very narrow widths during the animations section display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
